mapper.select: /* 정산: 행 잠금 조회 (상태 전이 검증용) */ SELECT STLM_SN AS stlmSn, TRD_SN AS trdSn, USR_SN AS usrSn, STLM_AMT AS stlmAmt, STLM_STATUS_CD AS stlmStatusCd, STLM_REG_DT AS stlmRegDt, STLM_UPDT_DT AS stlmUpdtDt FROM SETTLEMENT WHERE STLM_SN = #{stlmSn} FOR UPDATE

/* 정산: 회원별 목록 (최신순 100건) */ SELECT STLM_SN AS stlmSn, TRD_SN AS trdSn, USR_SN AS usrSn, STLM_AMT AS stlmAmt, STLM_STATUS_CD AS stlmStatusCd, STLM_REG_DT AS stlmRegDt, STLM_UPDT_DT AS stlmUpdtDt FROM SETTLEMENT WHERE USR_SN = #{usrSn} ORDER BY STLM_SN DESC LIMIT 100

/* 정산: 거래별 목록 */ SELECT STLM_SN AS stlmSn, TRD_SN AS trdSn, USR_SN AS usrSn, STLM_AMT AS stlmAmt, STLM_STATUS_CD AS stlmStatusCd, STLM_REG_DT AS stlmRegDt, STLM_UPDT_DT AS stlmUpdtDt FROM SETTLEMENT WHERE TRD_SN = #{trdSn} ORDER BY STLM_SN DESC
